body:
main.py is the "visitor" thingie

love you!!! ♥
explanation: The code defines a tree-like structure for processing equations, where each node can be a single calculation (Leaf) or a composite of multiple calculations (Multi). The main function initiates the evaluation process, handling successes and failures, and managing potential exceptions. Each leaf node performs calculations and checks their validity, while multi nodes verify that all contained leaves return valid results, and they halt processing if any leaf fails.
name: 2012-04-28_tree-thingie
subject: tree thingie
summary: This project implements a tree structure to evaluate mathematical equations using a visitor pattern.
